title: Miscarriage of Justice application service (MOJAS) claims Management Information - April 2016 to March 2025
body: "MOJAS considers applications for compensation made under s133 of the Criminal Justice Act 1988 by individuals if they have had their conviction overturned or quashed by the courts in certain specific circumstances. The application service transferred to MoJ from the Home Office in 2007 and this is a statutory function of the MoJ. "
